summary: U.S. Census Bureau dataset identifying census tracts and counties meeting the RAISE program's persistent poverty definition. Columns include state, county, census tract name, and whether each geographic unit meets the APP county, APP census tract, and HDC census tract definitions.

Federal railroad master registry listing active and historical U.S. railroad companies. Columns include railroad company name, code, start/end dates, organization type, SMT grouping, parent company, and holding company.

Federal inventory of highway-railroad grade crossings across the U.S. Columns include state code, street name, operating railroad code, railroad division, transit track indicator, city code, effective date, and location source.

U.S. DOT Wyoming Connected Vehicle Pilot test data for LTE-V2X forward collision warning (FCW) with slow-moving vehicle scenario (WFCW-3, Rep 2). Columns include event name, geographic coordinates, and description.

North American Rail Network (NARN) geospatial dataset of U.S. freight railroad track segments. Columns include track owner codes, track rights, number of tracks, double-stack indicator, county FIPS, FRA arc/node IDs, and state/county FIPS.

Federal inventory of highway-railroad rail crossings across the U.S. Columns include longitude, crossing purpose, county name, operating railroad code, highway name, revision date, milepost, other track indicators, and railroad division.

Federal Highway Administration Highway Statistics table HM-20 tracking annual public road length in miles by functional system class, state, and rural/urban designation from 1980 to 2024. Columns include functional class, state, rural/urban type, miles, and year.

U.S. DOT Wyoming Connected Vehicle Pilot test data for LTE-V2X forward collision warning (FCW) with slow-moving vehicle scenario (WFCW-3, Rep 1). Columns include event name, description, and geographic coordinates.

NHTSA Takata airbag recall tracking net remaining uninflated airbags by vehicle manufacturer and category. Columns include manufacturer, category, number of inflators, percent of category, and report date.
DOT data release schedule for transportation incident reports. Columns include month of publication and month of incident.

Federal Highway Administration Highway Performance Monitoring System (HPMS) toll ID reference table mapping toll IDs to facility names by state. Columns include HPMS toll ID, state, and name of toll facility.
DOT legacy-to-new website crosswalk mapping old report names to their current equivalents. Columns include legacy report name and new report name.
